description: Partnership contract. Dated: Tammuz 1460 Seleucid, which is 1149 CE, under the authority of the Nagid Shemuel b. Ḥananya. Tamīm b. Natan receives from Abū l-Faraj Yeshuʿa b. Shelomo 51(?) dinars in order to do business with the money abroad. (Information in part from Goitein’s index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בCUL & Bodl..
